display.purpose: Hero titles, winner name, player rank. Space Grotesk 700, tight tracking. Countdown digit is a 200-420px special case.

title.purpose: Card headings, player names, section titles.

body.purpose: Prose and supporting copy in Grey, capped 65-75ch. Inter.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, timers, join codes, status. JetBrains Mono, UPPERCASE, 0.14em.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: The one deliberate glow — input while focused, paired with a coral border. State-driven only.

shadows.name: toggle-knob
shadows.purpose: Hairline lift on the switch handle so it reads as physical.

motion.name: ease-stage
motion.purpose: The house easing for entrances and bar fills — fast out, soft settle. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: riseIn
motion.purpose: Default entrance. Transform-only so content is never invisible if a timeline is throttled.

motion.name: popIn
motion.purpose: Entrance for player rows, cards, the countdown digit. Transform-only.

motion.name: stagger
motion.purpose: Sequence children of a revealed list.

motion.name: instant-selection
motion.purpose: Selection-state backgrounds (active cell, selected pill/tab) change instantly — transitions stick mid-state in throttled webviews.

breakpoints.name: display
breakpoints.value: 16:9 booth/room screen, read at distance, nothing critical below ~14px

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action on a screen. One coral button per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: var(--head, 'Space Grotesk'), sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #fff; background: var(--coral, #FE414D); border: none; border-radius: var(--r-md, 12px); padding: 16px 22px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform .12s ease, background .15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #EC3743; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.985); }

components.name: Dark Button
components.description: Terminal or destructive actions (End Round). Ink fill, cream text.
components.css: .ds-btn-dark { font-family: var(--head, 'Space Grotesk'), sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--cream, #F5F2EA); background: var(--ink, #1F1B19); border: none; border-radius: var(--r-md, 12px); padding: 16px 22px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform .12s ease, background .15s ease; } .ds-btn-dark:hover { background: #322C28; } .ds-btn-dark:active { transform: scale(0.985); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary / tertiary actions. Hairline inset border, no fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: var(--head, 'Space Grotesk'), sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--ink, #1F1B19); background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: var(--r-md, 12px); padding: 16px 22px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1.5px rgba(31,27,25,0.42); transition: box-shadow .15s ease, background .15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1.5px var(--ink, #1F1B19); background: rgba(31,27,25,0.03); }

components.name: Live / AI Chip
components.description: Soft coral pill for live and AI states. A pulsing dot precedes the label.
components.css: .ds-chip-soft { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: var(--mono, 'JetBrains Mono'), monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--coral-ink, #C4242F); background: var(--coral-tint, rgba(254,65,77,0.10)); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--coral-line, rgba(254,65,77,0.45)); border-radius: 100px; padding: 5px 10px; } .ds-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 100px; background: currentColor; animation: dsPulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes dsPulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.25; } }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Name entry, puzzle fields. Coral focus ring is the only glow in the system.
components.css: .ds-field { font-family: var(--head, 'Space Grotesk'), sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 22px; color: var(--ink, #1F1B19); background: var(--paper, #FBF9F2); border: 1.5px solid rgba(31,27,25,0.20); border-radius: var(--r-md, 12px); padding: 18px; width: 100%; outline: none; transition: border-color .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease; } .ds-field::placeholder { color: var(--grey-soft, #8C867E); font-weight: 500; } .ds-field:focus { border-color: var(--coral, #FE414D); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--coral-tint, rgba(254,65,77,0.10)); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Paper surface with a hairline border. Flat by default; no resting shadow. Never nested.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--paper, #FBF9F2); border: 1px solid rgba(31,27,25,0.12); border-radius: var(--r-lg, 18px); padding: 18px; } .ds-card-label { font-family: var(--mono, 'JetBrains Mono'), monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: var(--grey-soft, #8C867E); } .ds-card-val { font-family: var(--mono, 'JetBrains Mono'), monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-size: 30px; color: var(--coral, #FE414D); margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Leaderboard Row
components.description: Rank / name / time, hairline-divided. The leader row's rank turns coral.
components.css: .ds-lb { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 30px 1fr auto; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 13px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(31,27,25,0.12); } .ds-lb-rank { font-family: var(--mono, 'JetBrains Mono'), monospace; font-size: 14px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: var(--grey-soft, #8C867E); } .ds-lead .ds-lb-rank { color: var(--coral, #FE414D); } .ds-lb-name { font-family: var(--head, 'Space Grotesk'), sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: var(--ink, #1F1B19); } .ds-lb-time { font-family: var(--mono, 'JetBrains Mono'), monospace; font-size: 14px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: var(--grey, #5A5550); }

components.name: Crossword Cells
components.description: Signature grid. Active cell is Spotlight Coral; the current word path is the warm Inword Highlight. Selection backgrounds change with NO transition.
components.html:
1C
A
T
components.css: .ds-xw { display: inline-grid; grid-auto-flow: column; gap: 2px; background: var(--ink, #1F1B19); padding: 2px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-cell { position: relative; width: 44px; height: 44px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: var(--paper, #FBF9F2); font-family: var(--head, 'Space Grotesk'), sans-serif; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink, #1F1B19); } .ds-inword { background: #FBE9D2; } .ds-active { background: var(--coral, #FE414D); color: #fff; } .ds-cell-num { position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 3px; font-family: var(--mono, 'JetBrains Mono'), monospace; font-size: 9px; line-height: 1; color: var(--grey-soft, #8C867E); }

narrative.overview: Crossword Battle is Swiss editorial print that flips to a lit stage in the moments that earn it. At rest it is a press-cream broadsheet: warm paper, charcoal ink (never pure black), mono labels in small caps, hairline rules, generous restraint. Then the countdown drops to full-bleed dark, a single 260px coral digit pops on every tick, and the same calm system becomes a game show. The console is quiet so the reveals can be loud. The accent — Spotlight Coral — behaves like a stage light, not a brand fill: on any view it marks exactly one thing, and its rarity is the point. Depth never comes from shadows; it comes from a tonal paper ladder (cream background to paper cards to recessed paper-edge wells) and charcoal hairlines.
keyCharacteristics: Press-cream paper + a single coral spotlight; ink, never black.
Three type voices with strict jobs: Space Grotesk titles, Inter prose, JetBrains Mono system text.
Flat by default; depth via tonal layering and hairlines, not shadows.
Quiet operational controls; theatrical weight reserved for countdown, winner, and the public board.
Big tabular numbers dominate; the 16:9 booth display is legible across a room.
White-label by construction: one editable accent re-themes the whole stage.

rules.name: The Spotlight Rule
rules.body: Coral marks at most one element per view — the single most important action, state, or result. Forbidden as decoration, as a wash on neutral content, or as a second emphasis competing with the first. Rarity is the meaning.

rules.name: The No-Black Rule
rules.body: Pure #000 is prohibited. All 'black' text and dark surfaces are Ink (#1F1B19) or Night (#181513).

rules.name: The No-SaaS-Blue Rule
rules.body: Generic SaaS blue is forbidden anywhere. There is one accent and it is coral.

rules.name: The Mono-System Rule
rules.body: Anything the machine says (timers, codes, status, labels, percentages) is JetBrains Mono, uppercase, 0.14em. Anything a person reads as a sentence is Inter. Anything that announces is Space Grotesk. Never blur the jobs.

rules.name: The Tabular-Numerals Rule
rules.body: Every timer, score, code, and leaderboard figure uses tabular-nums. Digits must not jitter as they tick.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The only elevation is state-driven (input focus ring, switch knob) or a full tonal shift to a dark stage. Reaching for a resting drop shadow on a card is off-system — use a hairline border or the next rung of the paper ladder.

dos: Do reserve Spotlight Coral for the single most important element on a view. Everything else lives in ink, grey, and cream.
Do build depth from the tonal paper ladder (cream to paper to paper-edge) and charcoal hairlines, not drop shadows.
Do set all system text (timers, codes, labels, status) in JetBrains Mono, uppercase, 0.14em; use tabular-nums on every figure.
Do keep big numbers dominant on the 16:9 booth display and nothing critical below ~14px — it is read across a room.
Do collapse empty white-label brand fields cleanly (the lockup helper joins only non-empty parts) so the neutral default reads intentional.
Do animate entrances transform-only (riseIn translateY 12->0, popIn scale .94->1) on the cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1) curve with ~70ms child stagger.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS blue, the hero-metric template, or endless identical card grids (anti-reference: generic SaaS dashboard).
Don't gamify: no confetti, cartoon mascots, badges/XP, rainbow palettes, or bouncy/elastic motion (anti-reference: gamified consumer app).
Don't fall into Kahoot-style quiz cliches — saturated primary blocks, oversized emoji, playful-rounded everything (anti-reference: quiz-app cliches).
Don't go cold, dense, or clinical gray (anti-reference: austere enterprise tool). The restraint here is warm and editorial.
Don't use pure black (#000) — text and dark surfaces are Ink (#1F1B19) or Night (#181513).
Don't put a CSS transition on any selection-state background (active cell, selected pill/tab) — set them instantly.
Don't animate content in from opacity: 0 — entrances are transform-only so content is never invisible if a timeline is throttled.
Don't over-round: cards top out at 18px; reaching for 24/32px+ on a card is off-system.
Don't spread coral as a fill or second emphasis. One spotlight per view.
